item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 3min Field Of Gold looks set to make his seasonal reappearance at Sandown on Friday
£921,82
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 3min Field Of Gold looks set to make his seasonal reappearance at Sandown on Friday
£921,823 career earnings 128 Best RPR Two Group 1 wins
A fan's favourite. Hecho con IA 1 2 232

item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 5min "His finishing effort was hard to ignore!"
@JFlaRacingNerd nominates his eyecatchers
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 5min "His finishing effort was hard to ignore!"
@JFlaRacingNerd nominates his eyecatchers for your ATR tracker, including one at @NewburyRacing from over the weekend De attheraces.com 1 1 369
